refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by reviewing documented performance targets with traceability matrices and audit logs of baseline/calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements with traceability to worksite inputs
Manage performance requirement updates including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using mission data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with traceability links
Version-controlled management system for baseline and calibration updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation engine, traceable database, and version-controlled management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation logic and database schema
Management system dependent on accurate input data from mission context
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions minimizing cross-module dependencies; interfaces to other system parts are well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable and timely mission context data availability
Risk of data inconsistency if updates are not properly version-controlled
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design within the integrated subsystem to isolate derivation, recording, and management functions for maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data inputs for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other NGHE subsystems or operator interfaces

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update propagation across distributed modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as all DP functions are centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has minimal relevance; forcing containment here would increase diffusion.
Teleoperation unrelated to performance requirement derivation; poor containment.
Safety Services may consume performance data but not responsible for derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the DP in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and version control effectively.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth if NGHE Solution module becomes too large
Dependency on reliable network link for synchronization
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider internal sub-modularization; ensure robust network protocols for data consistency.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear traceability and manageable complexity.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution; interfaces are well-defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability matrices and audit logs within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to the NGHE Solution implementation module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider internal modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity
Validate network link reliability for synchronization

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clear traceability. No further decomposition is needed at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record performance requirements with traceability to worksite inputs
Manage performance requirement updates including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Current level decomposition and assignments are adequate and consistent with domain constraints.

assumptions: Mission context data is accurate and timely
open_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Data consistency risks if version control is not robust
evidence_needed: Verification of traceability matrices and audit logs
